name: prog-reorder
note: S-PROG-REORDER prototype (operator directive 2026-07-10): drag a progression chord to reorder it. Mouse path lifts on movement (touch uses a 300ms long-press - not simulatable here; the touch discipline is the operator's feel pass). Asserts the ORDER changed in the rendered strip and that the drop did not strum-click or delete anything.

steps.label: five chords, compact stage, starting order C F G Am Em
steps.js: (function(){var n=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#prog .slot .scName')).map(function(e){return e.textContent.trim()});return n.join(' ')==='C F G Am Em'})()

steps.label: C moved to the end - order F G Am Em C
steps.js: (function(){var n=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#prog .slot .scName')).map(function(e){return e.textContent.trim()});return n.join(' ')==='F G Am Em C'})()

steps.label: dragged back to the front - order C F G Am Em
steps.js: (function(){var n=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('#prog .slot .scName')).map(function(e){return e.textContent.trim()});return n.join(' ')==='C F G Am Em'})()
